name: ꗃ ⋆ ࣪ . Rerir / Reflins 🩹 . ‹ Genshin Impact
description:
HAPPY NEW YEAR!

«Rerir is late for the party, will he arrive on time?»

• Rerir looks like the picture here, but she also has some scars.

• You can choose Flins and Rerir's work yourself, I will try not to mention it anywhere. Also, their love story is not described here, so your imagination is free to run wild!
